title: US and Nigeria Announce Death of Senior IS Leader
subtitle: A joint military operation in the Lake Chad Basin marks a new level of cooperation between the two nations.

summary.en: United States and Nigerian forces have successfully killed a high-ranking Islamic State leader named Abu-Bilal al-Minuki. The operation took place in the Lake Chad Basin, a region known for militant activity. US President Donald Trump described the mission as a major blow to the group's global operations. Nigerian President Bola Tinubu praised the mission as a successful example of international cooperation. The strike follows months of intelligence gathering and increased military support from the US in the region.
summary.zh: 美國與奈及利亞部隊成功擊斃了一名名為阿布-比拉勒·阿爾-米努基的伊斯蘭國高階領袖。行動發生在以武裝活動聞名的查德湖盆地地區。美國總統川普形容此任務是對該組織全球行動的重大打擊。奈及利亞總統提努布稱讚此任務是國際合作的成功典範。此次襲擊是經過數月情資蒐集，以及美國在該地區增加軍事支援後的成果。

paragraphs.en: The United States and Nigeria have announced the death of a senior leader from the Islamic State (IS) group. The man, identified as Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, was killed during a joint military operation conducted by forces from both countries. US President Donald Trump confirmed the news on his social media platform, describing al-Minuki as the second-in-command of the IS organization globally and calling him one of the most active terrorists in the world.
paragraphs.zh: 美國與奈及利亞宣布，伊斯蘭國（Islamic State，簡稱 IS）組織的一名資深領袖已經死亡。該名男子身分為阿布-比拉勒·阿爾-米努基（Abu-Bilal al-Minuki），他在兩國軍隊聯合執行的軍事行動中被擊斃。美國總統川普（Donald Trump）在社群媒體平台上證實了這項消息，形容阿爾-米努基是 IS 全球組織的第二號人物，並稱他是世界上最活躍的恐怖分子之一。

paragraphs.en: According to the BBC, the operation took place in the Lake Chad Basin, a large area of water and land shared by Nigeria, Chad, Niger, and Cameroon. This region has long been a base for militant groups like Boko Haram and the Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP). Nigerian President Bola Tinubu stated that the mission was a daring success that dealt a heavy blow to the terrorist group. He confirmed that al-Minuki was killed alongside several of his top assistants during a strike on his base.
paragraphs.zh: 根據英國廣播公司（BBC）報導，這項行動發生在查德湖盆地（Lake Chad Basin），這是一片由奈及利亞、查德、尼日與喀麥隆共同擁有的廣大水域與陸地。該地區長期以來一直是博科聖地（Boko Haram）與伊斯蘭國西非省（ISWAP）等武裝團體的基地。奈及利亞總統提努布（Bola Tinubu）表示，這項任務是一次大膽且成功的行動，對該恐怖組織造成了沉重打擊。他證實阿爾-米努基在針對其基地的襲擊中，與數名核心助手一同被擊斃。

paragraphs.en: The Nigerian military provided further details, noting that the operation began shortly after midnight on a Saturday. They reported that the mission was the result of months of careful intelligence gathering and reconnaissance. A military spokesperson stated that there were no casualties or loss of equipment among the forces involved, highlighting the growing cooperation between Nigerian and US military teams. The US has recently increased its presence in Nigeria, deploying drones and roughly 200 troops to provide training and information support to local forces.
paragraphs.zh: 奈及利亞軍方提供了更多細節，指出行動於週六午夜過後不久展開。他們表示，這項任務是經過數月謹慎情資蒐集與偵察的成果。軍方發言人指出，參與行動的部隊沒有人員傷亡或裝備損失，這凸顯了奈及利亞與美國軍事團隊之間日益增長的合作關係。美國近期增加了在奈及利亞的駐軍，部署了無人機與約兩百名士兵，為當地部隊提供訓練與資訊支援。

paragraphs.en: Al-Minuki was a well-known figure in the region. According to NPR, he was born in Nigeria’s Borno State and had been a senior commander for Boko Haram before the group pledged its loyalty to IS in 2015. He was later designated as a global terrorist by the US government in 2023. Officials believe he played a key role in the group’s administrative body, which manages funding and provides guidance for IS operations around the world. Some reports also link him to the 2018 kidnapping of over 100 schoolgirls in north-eastern Nigeria.
paragraphs.zh: 阿爾-米努基在該地區是知名人物。根據美國國家公共電台（NPR）報導，他出生於奈及利亞的博爾諾州（Borno State），在該組織於二〇一五年宣誓效忠 IS 之前，曾是博科聖地的高階指揮官。他隨後於二〇二三年被美國政府列為全球恐怖分子。官員認為，他在該組織的行政機構中扮演關鍵角色，負責管理資金並為全球的 IS 行動提供指導。部分報導也將他與二〇一八年發生在奈及利亞東北部、超過一百名女學生遭綁架的事件連結起來。

paragraphs.en: Analysts have noted the significance of this event. Malik Samuel, a researcher at Good Governance Africa, told NPR that if the death is confirmed, it would be a major development because it marks the first time security forces have successfully targeted someone so high in the IS hierarchy. He added that the operation likely caused significant chaos within the group, as the strike took place deep inside a fortified base that is usually very difficult for security forces to access.
paragraphs.zh: 分析人士指出此事件的重要性。非營利組織「良善治理非洲」（Good Governance Africa）的研究員馬利克·山繆（Malik Samuel）告訴 NPR，如果死亡消息獲得證實，這將是一項重大進展，因為這是安全部隊首次成功鎖定 IS 高層中如此重要的人物。他補充說，這項行動很可能在組織內部造成嚴重混亂，因為襲擊發生在一個戒備森嚴的基地深處，通常安全部隊很難進入該處。

paragraphs.en: However, the situation remains complex. The Nigerian military has faced criticism in the past for making similar claims about killing militant leaders, only to later discover the information was incorrect. For example, the military previously claimed to have killed al-Minuki in 2024, but later admitted that the person killed was actually a different fighter using the same name. Despite this history, the current announcement is being treated as a major victory by both Washington and Abuja.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，局勢依然複雜。奈及利亞軍方過去曾因發表類似擊斃武裝領袖的聲明，隨後卻發現資訊不正確而面臨批評。例如，軍方曾於二〇二四年宣稱擊斃阿爾-米努基，但後來承認被殺的人其實是另一名使用相同名字的戰士。儘管有此紀錄，華盛頓與阿布加（Abuja）當局仍將此次公告視為一場重大勝利。

paragraphs.en: The operation comes at a time of heightened political tension. President Trump has previously accused the Nigerian government of failing to protect Christians from militant violence in the north-west. The Nigerian government has consistently denied these claims, stating that its security forces work to protect all citizens regardless of their religion. In response to the security crisis, the US has increased its military involvement, launching strikes against IS-linked militants in December and sending advisors to the region earlier this year.
paragraphs.zh: 這項行動發生在政治緊張局勢加劇之際。川普總統過去曾指責奈及利亞政府未能保護西北部的基督徒免受武裝暴力侵害。奈及利亞政府一貫否認這些說法，表示其安全部隊致力於保護所有公民，不分宗教信仰。為了回應安全危機，美國增加了軍事介入，於十二月對與 IS 相關的武裝分子發動襲擊，並於今年稍早向該地區派遣了顧問。

paragraphs.en: Looking ahead, the death of al-Minuki is expected to disrupt the funding and command structures of IS in Africa. With about 90% of IS attacks now occurring in sub-Saharan Africa, the region has become the primary focus for the group. By removing a leader who was responsible for planning attacks against both local communities and international interests, the US and Nigeria hope to weaken the group’s influence. While the long-term impact on regional security remains to be seen, officials from both nations view this mission as a clear sign that their partnership is becoming more effective in the fight against terrorism.
paragraphs.zh: 展望未來，阿爾-米努基的死亡預計將擾亂 IS 在非洲的資金與指揮結構。由於目前約百分之九十的 IS 攻擊事件發生在撒哈拉以南非洲，該地區已成為該組織的主要焦點。透過剷除一名負責策劃針對當地社區與國際利益攻擊的領袖，美國與奈及利亞希望削弱該組織的影響力。雖然對區域安全的長期影響仍有待觀察，但兩國官員皆將此任務視為雙方在反恐合作上正變得更加有效的明確跡象。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To cause serious damage or a major setback to someone or something.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 給予沉重打擊，造成嚴重損害或挫折。
keyTerms.noteZh: 此處為比喻用法，形容軍事行動對恐怖組織造成的嚴重影響。文中：Nigerian President Bola Tinubu stated that the mission was a daring success that dealt a heavy blow to the terrorist group.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A place from which military operations are directed or where troops are stationed.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（以...為基礎），這裡作名詞，指軍事據點。文中：This region has long been a base for militant groups like Boko Haram and the Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP).

keyTerms.definitionEn: A military attack, usually by aircraft or missiles.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（打擊），這裡作名詞，指軍事行動。文中：He confirmed that al-Minuki was killed alongside several of his top assistants during a strike on his base.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To indicate or represent an important stage or event in a process.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 標誌著、象徵（某個階段或事件）。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（記號），這裡作動詞，表示事件的意義。文中：Malik Samuel, a researcher at Good Governance Africa, told NPR that if the death is confirmed, it would be a major development because it marks the first time security forces have successfully targeted someone so high in the IS hierarchy.

sources.name: BBC News
sources.title: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say

sources.name: The Guardian World
sources.title: Trump says Islamic State ‘second in command’ killed by US and Nigerian forces

sources.name: NPR News
sources.title: Trump says Islamic State group leader was killed in a joint U.S.-Nigerian mission

sources.name: Deutsche Welle (DW) Top
sources.title: Trump says IS second in command killed in Nigeria

quiz.question: According to the article, what specific detail regarding the military operation was highlighted by the Nigerian military spokesperson?

options.A: The operation was launched in response to a recent attack on a school.
options.B: The mission was completed without any loss of life or equipment on their side.
options.C: The operation was carried out primarily by US drone strikes without ground support.
options.D: The mission took place during the day to ensure maximum visibility of the target.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第三段，軍方發言人明確指出，在此次行動中，參與部隊沒有任何傷亡或設備損失。選項 A 雖然文章提到過綁架事件，但未將其連結為此次行動的直接觸發點。選項 C 錯誤，因為文章提到這是兩國部隊的聯合行動，且有地面部隊參與。選項 D 與原文矛盾，文章提到行動是在午夜過後開始的。

quiz.question: Based on the text, why might some observers remain cautious about the announcement of al-Minuki's death?

options.A: Because the US government has not yet officially confirmed the identity of the body.
options.B: Because the Nigerian military has a history of mistakenly reporting the deaths of militant leaders.
options.C: Because al-Minuki is known to have multiple body doubles who look exactly like him.
options.D: Because the Lake Chad Basin is too large for the military to verify the site of the strike.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第六段，奈及利亞軍方過去曾有過類似的宣告紀錄，但後來發現資訊不正確，甚至在 2024 年曾誤報過 al-Minuki 的死亡。選項 A 錯誤，因為文章第一段提到川普總統已確認此消息。選項 C 雖提到誤報原因，但原文是指「同名者」，而非「替身」。選項 D 並非懷疑的原因，文章重點在於過去的紀錄而非地理環境的限制。

quiz.question: In the context of the fifth paragraph, what does the word 'fortified' mean?

options.B: Strategically located near a water source.
options.C: Strengthened against attack with defensive structures.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。在文中，fortified 用來形容恐怖分子的基地，意指該地經過防禦性強化，使其難以進入。選項 A 指擁擠，與防禦無關。選項 B 雖然該地在湖邊，但這不是 fortified 的定義。選項 D 雖然隱蔽可能是一種防禦手段，但 fortified 強調的是「加固」或「防禦工事」，而非單純的隱藏。

quiz.question: What is the primary message of the article regarding the death of al-Minuki?

options.A: It marks the complete end of the Islamic State's influence in sub-Saharan Africa.
options.B: It highlights the political disagreements between the US and Nigerian governments.
options.C: It serves as a significant, albeit complex, milestone in the joint counter-terrorism efforts of the US and Nigeria.
options.D: It focuses primarily on the personal history and criminal background of al-Minuki.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。本文總結了此次行動的經過、重要性以及伴隨的複雜性（如過去的誤報紀錄與政治緊張），強調這是美奈兩國合作打擊恐怖主義的一個重大進展。選項 A 過於誇大，文章僅提到削弱影響力。選項 B 雖然文章提到政治緊張，但這只是背景而非主旨。選項 D 僅是文章的一部分，並非整篇文章的核心目的。
